title: vendor containers/image for parallel copying of layers
body:
Vendor the latest containers/image 50e5e55e46a391df8fce1291b2337f1af879b822
to enable parallel copying of layers.

Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <rothberg@redhat.com>

comments.body: @runcom, the CI is green, the commit is clean, and that's where the rhyme ends. PTAL ;)
SGTM. I am about to perform some benchmarks comparing pull-performance of Docker, old Skopeo and new Skopeo.
I'm tagging a new skopeo now.
